creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: lth
Date: Wed Jan  9 09:19:24 2013
New Revision: 310128
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/310128

Log:
  - Update to 0.017
  - Add LICENSE
  
  PR:		ports/175154
  Submitted by:	Po-Chien Lin <linpc@cs.nctu.edu.tw>

Modified:
  head/devel/p5-Test-Moose-More/Makefile
  head/devel/p5-Test-Moose-More/distinfo

Modified: head/devel/p5-Test-Moose-More/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/p5-Test-Moose-More/Makefile	Wed Jan  9 08:36:41 2013	(r310127)
+++ head/devel/p5-Test-Moose-More/Makefile	Wed Jan  9 09:19:24 2013	(r310128)
@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	Test-Moose-More
-PORTVERSION=	0.011
+PORTVERSION=	0.017
 CATEGORIES=	devel perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	Test
@@ -10,9 +10,15 @@ PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 MAINTAINER=	lth@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	More tools for testing Moose packages
 
+LICENSE=	LGPL21
+
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-Data-OptList>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Data-OptList \
 		p5-Moose>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Moose \
-		p5-Sub-Exporter>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Sub-Exporter
+		p5-Moose-Autobox>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Moose-Autobox \
+		p5-Perl6-Junction>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Perl6-Junction \
+		p5-Sub-Exporter>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Sub-Exporter \
+		p5-TAP-SimpleOutput>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-TAP-SimpleOutput \
+		p5-namespace-autoclean>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-namespace-autoclean
 RUN_DEPENDS:=	${BUILD_DEPENDS}
 
 PERL_CONFIGURE=	yes

Modified: head/devel/p5-Test-Moose-More/distinfo
==============================================================================
